title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 36.
content:
There was an Old Person of Cadiz,
    Who was always polite to all ladies;
    But in handing his daughter,
    He fell into the water,
    Which drowned that Old Person of Cadiz.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 36."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
